feeModel: taker 0.04% round-trip; capital $20 risk $1 lev 5; notional=risk/(SL%)
caveat: Depth/orderbook trigger (live 4th signal) omitted — no historical L2. Entry=close at signal bar. Horizon=720 bars (12h).

verdict.noteGate3Noise: gate=3 profitable only on N=5 trades (noise, not deployable)
verdict.pipelineNote: reference backtest_live.js uses 30-bar forward window (unresolved trades excluded); this sweep uses 720-bar (12h) hold mirroring live continuous monitoring, more faithful to live bot which runs until exit.
